description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv' is already open in JASP. This dataset (Field, 2013) contains data from 103 students on Exam performance (%), Anxiety level, Revision time, and Gender. Perform a One-Way MANOVA to test for gender differences in both Exam performance and Anxiety simultaneously. Include descriptive statistics in the analysis and save the JASP file as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety_MANOVA.jasp'.
